integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the OpenCAD Admin Panel.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal does not show direct database queries (e.g., mysql, sqlite3) or curl/API commands used to change the user's password hash directly.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual OpenCAD application.
